items.briefing:
Global cyberattacks jumped 17% in June compared to last year, according to Check Point Research, meaning Australian organisations face a growing threat environment. Microsoft has also patched a zero-day vulnerability called RoguePlanet, so if your organisation uses Microsoft products, ensure updates are applied as soon as possible.

OpenAI has launched ChatGPT Work and GPT-5.6 models in Australia, bringing new AI tools to local workplaces. As AI adoption grows, be cautious about what sensitive information you share with these platforms — work data should stay within approved tools only.

**Tip:** Check that your Microsoft software is fully updated today to protect against the recently patched RoguePlanet vulnerability.

featured.title: ACSC warns of large-scale campaign exploiting CMS vulnerabilities in Australia
featured.quote: ACSC warns of widespread CMS vulnerability exploitation affecting Australian organisations directly.
